debug_info.goal:
S : LightProfinite
inst✝ : Nonempty ↑S.toTop
⊢ Injective (lightToProfinite.obj S)

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
by
    letI (n : ℕ) : Finite (S.component n) := inferInstance
    letI : Nonempty (S.component 0) := Nonempty.map (S.proj 0) inferInstance
    letI (n : ℕ) : Epi (lightToProfinite.map (S.transitionMap n)) :=
      (epi_iff_surjective _).mpr (S.surjective_transitionMap n)

    let k n := Nat.rec ⟨k0.choose, k0.choose_spec⟩ (fun n kn ↦ ⟨(step n kn.1 kn.property).choose, (step n kn.1 kn.property).choose_spec.2⟩) n
    let k_cone : Cone (S.diagram ⋙ lightToProfinite) := { pt := Y,
      π := NatTrans.ofOpSequence (fun n ↦ (k n).1) (fun n ↦ (step n (k n).1 (k n).property).choose_spec.1.symm) }
    let hL := isLimitOfPreserves lightToProfinite S.asLimit
    exact ⟨hL.lift k_cone, hL.uniq (k_cone.extend f) g (fun n ↦ (k n.unop).property.symm)⟩
